metadata.description: [Experimental] Whisper v3 Large -- but optimized by our inference wizards. Same WER, double the performance!

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/wizper
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/wizper queue.

x-fal-metadata.about: Transcribe an audio file using the Whisper model.

max_segment_len.title: Max Segment Len
max_segment_len.description: Maximum speech segment duration in seconds before splitting.

audio_url.title: Audio Url
audio_url.description: URL of the audio file to transcribe. Supported formats: mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav or webm.

task.title: Task
task.description: Task to perform on the audio file. Either transcribe or translate.

version.title: Version
version.description: Version of the model to use. All of the models are the Whisper large variant.

language.title: Language
language.description:
Language of the audio file.
        If translate is selected as the task, the audio will be translated to
        English, regardless of the language selected. If `None` is passed,
        the language will be automatically detected. This will also increase
        the inference time.

chunk_level.title: Chunk Level
chunk_level.description: Level of the chunks to return.

merge_chunks.title: Merge Chunks
merge_chunks.description: Whether to merge consecutive chunks. When enabled, chunks are merged if their combined duration does not exceed max_segment_len.

languages.title: Languages
languages.description: List of languages that the audio file is inferred to be. Defaults to null.

chunks.title: Chunks
chunks.description: Timestamp chunks of the audio file

timestamp.description: Start and end timestamp of the chunk
timestamp.title: Timestamp

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.display_name: ElevenLabs Speech to Text - Scribe V2
metadata.description: Use Scribe-V2 from ElevenLabs to do blazingly fast speech to text inferences!

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/elevenlabs/speech-to-text/scribe-v2
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/elevenlabs/speech-to-text/scribe-v2 queue.

x-fal-metadata.about:
ElevenLabs Speech to Text with Scribe V2: Transcribe audio with improved accuracy.

Transforms spoken audio into text with word-level timestamps and
optional speaker identification. Supports 99 languages with state-of-the-art accuracy.
Scribe V2 offers improved performance and supports keyterms for biasing transcription.

diarize.title: Diarize
diarize.description: Whether to annotate who is speaking

keyterms.title: Keyterms
keyterms.description: Words or sentences to bias the model towards transcribing. Up to 100 keyterms, max 50 characters each. Adds 30% premium over base transcription price.

audio_url.title: Audio Url
audio_url.description: URL of the audio file to transcribe

tag_audio_events.title: Tag Audio Events
tag_audio_events.description: Tag audio events like laughter, applause, etc.

text.title: Text
examples: Hey, this is a test recording for Scribe version two, which is now available on fal.ai.

text.title: Text
text.description: The transcribed word or audio event

speaker_id.description: Speaker identifier if diarization was enabled
speaker_id.title: Speaker Id

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of element (word, spacing, or audio_event)

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Generate text from speech using ElevenLabs advanced speech-to-text model.

speaker_id.title: Speaker Id

metadata.description: Leverage the rapid processing capabilities of AI models to enable accurate and efficient real-time speech-to-text transcription.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/speech-to-text
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/speech-to-text queue.

audio_url.description: Local filesystem path (or remote URL) to a long audio file
audio_url.title: Audio Path

use_pnc.title: Use Punctuation/Capitalization (PnC)
use_pnc.description: Whether to use Canary's built-in punctuation & capitalization

output.title: Transcribed Text
output.description: The partial or final transcription output from Canary

partial.title: Partial
partial.description: Indicates if this is a partial (in-progress) transcript

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Cohere Transcribe turns your business audio into accurate text, ready for search, analytics, and automation

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/cohere-transcribe
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/cohere-transcribe queue.

max_new_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate per audio chunk.
max_new_tokens.title: Max New Tokens

punctuation.description: Whether to include punctuation and capitalization in the output.
punctuation.title: Punctuation

language.description: Language of the audio (ISO 639-1 code). Supported: en, fr, de, it, es, pt, el, nl, pl, zh, ja, ko, vi, ar.
language.title: Language

audio_url.title: Audio Url
audio_url.description: URL of the audio file to transcribe. Supported formats: mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm, ogg, flac.

text.description: Transcribed text from the audio file.
text.title: Text

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.
